messages.body: The Grotto, this is Travis, how can I help you? Hello, hi Travis, this is Kripali, you're calling from Zoka. I work directly with the CEO and he asked me to personally give you a call. Would you have a couple of minutes …

Thank you so much for being with us! It’s truly been a pleasure working with you, and I wish you all the very best with your business. If you ever wish to work with us again in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach …
Im showing the website taken down. Thank you.
Hello Travis, apologies for this - ideally this shouldn’t be the case. I have got this rectified - please can you check and confirm the same?

I am doing really fine. I just wanted to understand Travis. I completely understand it could be a decision, yes or no. I just want to have a meeting with you for 10 minutes to understand how it's going to be, how we're g…

Hi, I am still reciving notifications from zoca about people trying to book a massage.  I wanted to know if i delete my account will thay take the website down or is that something that you are able to take down and make…

Hi Travis, I’m truly sorry for the mistake that happened on our end. It genuinely saddens me to see you go, but I completely understand and respect your decision. We’ve already initiated your request — please allow us 24…
Thank you for refunding my money and I appriciate the offer of a free month, but I would still like to cancel this service and have the webpage taken down please. Thank you for your understanding.
Hi I appreciate you looking into this but at this point I would be more greatful if you took down the website that you set up for me.
